meta.content: Use the form below if you'd like to search for something. Or check out some popular content below.

a.class: tbm-link level-2 d-xl-block d-none btn btn-primary

img.alt: Black Beauty Ranch staff with one of the animal residents

p.em: Our sanctuaries: Creating safe, nurturing environments where rescued animals receive care and a peaceful place to call home.

div.p: Kindness looks good on you! Shop for good: Snag cozy gear, fun gifts and animal-loving stocking stuffers—all while supporting our lifesaving work for all animals.

img.alt: Kitty Block, President and CEO of the Humane World for Animals, poses with Mini

p.em: A Humane World: A first-hand account of our ongoing efforts to protect animals, as told by our president and CEO, Kitty Block.

div.class: mb-3 form-item js-form-item form-type-textfield js-form-type-textfield form-item-keys js-form-item-keys

li.a: I'm having trouble affording my pet. What can I do?
I have a sick dog [cat, wildlife]. What can I do?
What does Humane World for Animals do?
Does Humane World for Animals work with my local shelter?
How do I make a donation?

p.strong: Oops! We can't seem to dig up that page.

div.p: Use the form below if you'd like to search for something. Or check out some popular content below.

div.h3: Or sniff out some of our other content

div.class: h-100 horizontal card col-md-6 col-12 mb-3 border-0

div.a: Are you having trouble affording your pet?

div.p: No owner wants their pet(s) to suffer because resources and/or medical care are out of reach. Help is out there!

div.class: h-100 horizontal card col-md-6 col-12 mb-3 border-0

img.alt: Happy dog at outdoor adoption event

div.a: Adopting pets from animal shelters or rescues

div.p: Looking to add a pet to your family? Local animal shelters and rescue groups can be great places to search.

div.class: h-100 horizontal card col-md-6 col-12 mb-3 border-0

img.alt: Sick corgi in cage at Petland

div.p: There are thousands of mass-breeding operations where mother dogs spend their entire lives in cramped cages being supported by pet stores like Petland.

div.class: h-100 horizontal card col-md-6 col-12 mb-3 border-0

img.alt: young piglets Patsy & Saffron play in Summer sunshine in their enclosure at Pigs In The Wood sanctuary for pigs

div.p: From factory farms to puppy mills, we target the most deeply rooted animal abuses affecting the greatest number of animals around the world.

div.class: h-100 horizontal card col-md-6 col-12 mb-3 border-0

img.alt: Two cats snuggle up to each other and one looks at the camera

div.p: Search a wide variety of articles to help you find answers to your pet care questions and ways to be an advocate for animals.

div.class: h-100 horizontal card col-md-6 col-12 mb-3 border-0

div.p: Read the latest stories about our work and the broader animal protection movement in our blog.

div.class: footer-region d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row justify-content-between align-items-start align-items-lg-center pb-4

div.p: © 2026 Humane World for Animals is registered as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions to Humane World for Animals are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Humane World for Animals' tax identification number is 53-0225390.
